name: list_my_issues
description: List all issues assigned to the current authenticated user. Use this to see your personal backlog or tasks. Do not use this for viewing team-wide issues; use list_team_issues instead. Returns issue objects with id, title, state, priority, and assignee fields.

name: list_team_issues
description: List all issues belonging to a specific team. Use this to view team backlog, sprint issues, or all issues in a team's workflow. Do not use this for your personal assigned issues; use list_my_issues instead. Requires a valid team_id from list_teams.

team_id.description: Linear team identifier (e.g., 'abc123', not the team key like 'ENG'). Obtain from list_teams output.

name: get_issue
description: Get full details of a specific issue by its identifier. Use this to retrieve the complete issue object including title, description, state, priority, assignee, created date, and labels. Do not use this for keyword search; use search_issues instead. Expects a valid issue identifier in the format TEAM-123 (e.g., 'CLP-123').

issue_id.description: Linear issue identifier (e.g., 'CLP-123', 'ENG-456'). Format: uppercase team key followed by hyphen and number.

name: search_issues
description: Search for issues by keyword in title and description. Use this to find issues matching specific terms. Do not use this for getting a specific issue by ID; use get_issue instead. Returns matching issues with basic fields.

query.description: Keyword or phrase to search in issue titles and descriptions (e.g., 'auth bug', 'login fail'). Case-insensitive.

name: create_issue
description: Create a new issue in a Linear team. Use this to create bugs, tasks, or feature requests. Requires team_id and title. Optional: description, priority, state_id, assignee_id. Do not use this to update existing issues; use update_issue instead.

team_id.description: Linear team identifier (e.g., 'abc123'). Required. Obtain from list_teams.

title.description: Issue title. Required. Brief summary of the issue (e.g., 'Bug: login fails').

description.description: Issue description body. Optional. Markdown-supported details, steps to reproduce, or context.

state_id.description: Initial workflow state ID. Optional. Obtain from list_states (e.g., 'xyz789' for 'In Progress').

assignee_id.description: Assignee user ID. Optional. Obtain from list_users. If not set, issue is unassigned.

name: update_issue
description: Update one or more fields of an existing issue. Use this to change status (state_id), title, description, assignee, or priority. Do not use this to add comments; use add_comment instead. Requires issue_id. At least one mutable field must be provided.

issue_id.description: Linear issue identifier to update (e.g., 'CLP-123'). Required.

title.description: New issue title. Optional. If provided, replaces existing title.

description.description: New issue description. Optional. If provided, replaces existing description. Markdown-supported.

state_id.description: New workflow state ID. Optional. Obtain from list_states (e.g., 'xyz789' to move to 'In Progress').

assignee_id.description: New assignee user ID. Optional. Obtain from list_users. Use empty string to unassign.

name: add_comment
description: Add a comment to an existing issue. Use this to add updates, notes, or mention team members. Do not use this to modify issue fields; use update_issue instead. The comment appears in the issue's activity feed.

issue_id.description: Linear issue identifier to comment on (e.g., 'CLP-123'). Required.

body.description: Comment text. Required. Supports Markdown formatting.

name: list_teams
description: List all teams in the Linear workspace. Use this to discover available teams and obtain team IDs for creating or filtering issues. Returns team objects with id, key, and name fields. Do not use this for listing team issues; use list_team_issues instead.

name: list_states
description: List workflow states for teams. Use this to find state IDs for updating issue status (e.g., to move to 'In Progress' or 'Done'). Returns state objects with id, name, and type. Do not use this for listing issues; use list_team_issues or list_my_issues instead.

team_id.description: Optional team identifier to filter states for a specific team. If not provided, lists all workflow states across all teams.

name: list_users
description: List all users in the Linear workspace. Use this to find user IDs for assigning issues or to view team members. Returns user objects with id, name, and email fields. Do not use this for listing issues.
